release_notes: v1.2.0 - Team database (server mode): several HR desktops can share one central candidate database on the office network (optional, off by default; set up in Settings). If the server is unreachable, screening and local reports keep working. DEI monitoring fields (Gender, Nationality, Age) are now shown and filterable in the results table, Candidate database, and reports - for monitoring only, never used for scoring or ranking. Results stay hidden until the first screening finishes. History and settings are preserved on update.
